candidate_summary: NUM-TRANCE-BASIN: external-judge agent observes target LLM output stream and emits basin-entry signal (via n-gram repetition, lexical diversity, KL-drift markers) to terminate self-consistency sampling. Analogous to San Bushmen n!um trance entry detected externally by community caregivers via observable physical markers.

results_analysis.title: Escaping Mode Collapse in LLM Generation via Geometric Regulation (2026/05)
results_analysis.reason: Correlation-dimension geometric marker for mode-collapse detection is a direct external-observable basin-entry detector — exact functional twin of NUM-TRANCE-BASIN's basin-marker mechanism. Triggers all three hit conditions.

results_analysis.title: Verbalized Sampling: Mitigate Mode Collapse Unlock Diversity (2025/10)
results_analysis.reason: Addresses same basin/mode-collapse phenomenon via sampling-side mitigation. Sem and func both exceed 0.7.

results_analysis.title: Learning Adaptive LLM Decoding (2026/03)
results_analysis.reason: Adaptive decoding with feedback-driven termination overlaps with adaptive termination of self-consistency sampling. All three hit conditions met.

results_analysis.title: Machine-generated text detection prevents language model collapse (2025/02)
results_analysis.reason: External detector identifying collapse patterns matches external-judge basin-entry detection paradigm — same external-observer mechanism. All three hit conditions met.

results_analysis.title: Agent-as-a-Judge (2025/08)
results_analysis.reason: Candidate explicitly cites this as the external-judge baseline component being recombined. Direct functional twin for external-judge layer. All three conditions met.

results_analysis.title: LLM-as-a-judge complete guide (EvidentlyAI)
results_analysis.reason: LLM-judge observability over traces is the canonical pattern candidate is recombining. Sem and func both above 0.7.

results_analysis.title: LLM-as-a-Judge (Langfuse docs)
results_analysis.reason: Stream-based ingest-time evaluation is functionally identical to monitoring output-stream for basin-entry markers. All three conditions met.

results_analysis.title: MAD Adaptive Stability Detection (Vusd1Hw2D9)
results_analysis.reason: Candidate explicitly cites this R400 reference as the adaptive-stopping baseline being recombined; KS-statistic stability detection on judge votes is functionally equivalent at basin-entry detection level. All three conditions met.

verdict_sentence: NUM-TRANCE-BASIN fails verification with 8 hits (well above the 1-hit fail threshold) because every retrieved result triggers at least one of kw>=2, sem>=0.7, or func>=0.7 — the candidate is an explicit recombination of cited prior art (Agent-as-a-Judge 2508.02994, MAD Adaptive Stability) with external-observer mode-collapse detection (2605.00435 correlation-dimension) acting as an exact functional twin.
